2026-04-23T08:14:08.3621804Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3622870Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3623311Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3623686Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3624007Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3624252Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3624419Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3624611Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3624792Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3625029Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-23T08:14:08.3625532Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:14:08.3625803Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
